seo.title: About YiJian Tech | Global Home Design & Delivery Platform
seo.description: Learn about YiJian Tech's mission, team, and business model. We aim to become China's version of a global home furnishing integrator.

hero.title: About **YiJian Tech**
hero.description: YiJian Tech is a cross-border home design brand focusing on **global whole-house design**, with AI design + China supply chain + global delivery at its core, serving overseas designers, builders, contractors, and mid-to-high-end customers with **design, products, and delivery** as an integrated spatial solution. Based in Foshan's industrial cluster, combined with mature cross-border brand operations and global delivery integration capabilities, we target high-value projects like full kitchens, whole-house customization, and space renovation, with the long-term goal of building a replicable global spatial solution platform.

position.title: Company Positioning
position.p1: YiJian Tech is a new cross-border home design brand based in Foshan, focusing on the high-potential
track, committed to building a cross-border home furnishing industry platform with **AI design-driven, China supply chain-supported, global delivery-integrated** capabilities at its core.
position.p2: The company is **not** positioned as a traditional furniture exporter or single-product cross-border e-commerce seller, but as a home furnishing brand providing **
integrated solutions** for global customers. We aim to upgrade China's home industry from
, gradually becoming **China's version of a global home furnishing integrator**.
position.p3: In terms of capability structure, YiJian Tech has built a complete core competency system around the front office, middle office, and back office of the home furnishing industry chain.

frontend.title: Front Office: AI Design Efficiency
frontend.description: In the front office, the company will integrate AI design tools to standardize spatial design, enable rapid rendering and online visualization, significantly reducing design barriers and labor costs, improving user experience and conversion efficiency, and gradually establishing
online design capabilities, allowing overseas designers, builders, and end customers to complete proposal confirmation and decision-making more efficiently.

middle.title: Middle Office: Supply Chain Collaboration
middle.description: In the middle office, leveraging Foshan's mature home manufacturing industry cluster, the company integrates quality factory resources, promoting product standardization, modularization, and cost optimization, establishing a supply chain collaboration system for global markets, ensuring stronger price competitiveness, quality stability, and delivery efficiency advantages in global markets.

backend.title: Back Office: Global Delivery Integration
backend.description: In the back office, the company will continuously connect overseas designer resources with local installation service systems,打通 the complete chain from proposal confirmation, product configuration, production delivery, logistics distribution to on-site installation, solving the core pain point of
in traditional cross-border home furnishing, forming a truly implementable integrated delivery closed loop.

team.title: Team Strengths
team.subtitle: Mature Cross-Border Brand Operations Experience
team.p1: Beyond the business model itself, another core advantage of YiJian Tech lies in team capabilities. The founding team has strong cross-border brand operations and industry integration capabilities, with long-term deep focus on standalone sites and DTC brand businesses, having successfully built **5 brands with $10M+ annual sales** (2 of which have long ranked #1 in North American categories), with cumulative cross-border e-commerce GMV exceeding **1 billion RMB**.
team.p2: The team has established mature methodologies and execution systems in brand positioning, standalone site operations, overseas traffic acquisition, content marketing, conversion optimization, user growth, supply chain collaboration, multi-platform operations, and scalable expansion.

business.title: Business Model & Long-Term Vision
business.p1: YiJian Tech takes **North American high-value home projects** as the core entry point, including full kitchens, whole-house customization, and space renovation, acquiring global customer demand through standalone sites and overseas social media, achieving rapid conversion through AI design tools, and completing fulfillment through China supply chain and local delivery networks, forming a **
business.p2: In the long term, YiJian Tech not only aims to become a cross-border home furnishing brand, but hopes to grow into a **replicable spatial solution platform**. In the future, the company will continue expanding to more countries and spatial categories, ultimately building a cross-border home ecosystem with China supply chain as the base and global design and service networks as touchpoints.

cta.title: Partner with YiJian Tech
cta.description: Whether you're a global customer seeking whole-house customization solutions or talented individuals looking to join us, we welcome your contact.

positions.title: Overseas Social Media Lead
positions.location: Foshan Qiandeng Lake Degao Xin Avenue
positions.summary: Deeply participate in building a cross-border home design brand from 0 to 1, leading brand content expression and user growth on overseas social media channels.

responsibilities.title: Responsibilities
items: Responsible for overall operation and growth of company overseas social media platforms, including but not limited to Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, LinkedIn, etc.

Develop overseas social media content strategy, account operation strategy, and phased growth plans based on brand positioning and business goals, improving brand exposure, user engagement, and lead conversion
Lead overseas social media content system construction, including topic planning, content scheduling, copywriting direction, visual style, short video scripts, and communication rhythm control

Output content aligned with overseas user aesthetics and consumption habits around core business (whole-house design, full kitchens, whole-house customization, space renovation), shaping brand professionalism and premium positioning

Coordinate with design, brand, advertising, standalone site, and sales teams to drive social media content synergy with customer acquisition and conversion goals, forming a growth closed loop from content to lead capture
Responsible for overseas KOL/KOC, influencers, designers, and home blogger resource development, cooperation, and management, improving brand influence and content distribution efficiency
Monitor overseas home, interior design, renovation, and lifestyle trends, continuously research competitors and excellent brand cases, optimize content direction and operation tactics
Responsible for platform operation data, regularly review fan growth, engagement rate, views, traffic effects, and conversion performance, continuously improving operation efficiency
Build and optimize social media operation SOPs, content mechanisms, and team collaboration processes, promoting systematic and standardized overseas social media operation capabilities

requirements.title: Requirements
items: Bachelor's degree or above, English as working language, able to independently complete English content planning, communication, and output
3+ years overseas social media operation experience, experience with standalone site brands, cross-border e-commerce, home furnishing, lifestyle, high-value consumer brands preferred
Familiar with content logic, recommendation mechanisms, and user preferences of mainstream overseas social media platforms, with hands-on experience with Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, etc.
Strong content planning and brand expression capabilities, able to transform product selling points, spatial design value, and brand concepts into content suitable for overseas distribution
Systematic understanding of
, not only able to create content but also understand conversion and business results
Strong data analysis and review capabilities, able to guide topic optimization, content iteration, and resource allocation through data
Cross-team collaboration capabilities, able to drive efficient cooperation among design, photography, editing, advertising, standalone site, and related teams
Good aesthetics, high sensitivity to home, space, and design content, strong control over premium brand tone

bonus.title: Bonus Points
items: Experience with home, interior design, whole-house customization, building materials, lifestyle brands
Experience with overseas local content teams, photography/video production, influencer resources, or agency cooperation
Familiar with standalone site user conversion paths, experience with lead-based business, appointment/consultation business operations
Familiar with AI content tools, video tools, design tools, able to improve content production efficiency
Experience building overseas brand social media matrix from 0 to 1 or viral content cases

value.title: Role Value
items: You will deeply participate in building a new cross-border home design brand from 0 to 1, around the innovative model of
, leading brand content expression and user growth on overseas social media channels, helping the company establish international brand influence and customer acquisition capabilities

positions.title: UI Design Lead
positions.summary: Participate in building the visual system of a cross-border home design brand from 0 to 1, leading standalone site design, brand visual communication, and content packaging.

responsibilities.title: Responsibilities
items: Responsible for overall visual design and page presentation of company standalone site, including homepage, campaign pages, product detail pages, special topic pages, landing pages, etc., continuously optimizing site brand feel, visual presentation, and user experience
Establish and improve standalone site visual standards, design components, and page style systems based on brand positioning and business needs, improving overall design efficiency and consistency

Responsible for daily brand communication material design, including but not limited to social media posters, ad images, campaign KVs, product images, brand introduction pages, investment materials, display materials, etc.

Coordinate with marketing, operations, brand, product, and other teams to complete various online and offline visual design needs, ensuring design output balances brand tone and communication effectiveness

Skilled use of AI design tools to improve visual creativity and output efficiency, participate in brand visual creativity, scene image production, concept image generation, proposal presentation, and related work
Responsible for short video visual packaging and basic editing, including video covers, subtitle styles, frame rhythm optimization, simple animation processing, and promotional video editing
Continuously optimize brand visual expression based on overseas user aesthetic trends and excellent industry cases, improving company overall image on standalone site and overseas communication

Collaborate with content, operations, technical development, and other teams to drive high-quality design implementation, balancing visual effects, interaction logic, and actual conversion performance
Manage and guide design team daily work, coordinate design schedules, review design quality, improving team overall output efficiency and professional standards

requirements.title: Requirements
items: Bachelor's degree or above, design, fine arts, visual communication, digital media, and related majors preferred
3+ years UI/visual design experience, experience with standalone sites, e-commerce brands, brand visual design preferred; team management experience preferred
Familiar with standalone site page design logic, able to independently complete website visual design, balancing brand expression, user experience, and conversion needs
Strong brand visual capabilities and aesthetic judgment, able to control overall design style, outputting visual content with premium feel, consistency, and commercial expression
Able to independently complete various communication material designs, with strong layout, typography, color matching, image processing, and creative expression capabilities
Proficient in mainstream design software such as Photoshop, Illustrator, Figma, Adobe XD, etc.
Familiar with and good at using AI tools for auxiliary design and creative output, including but not limited to AI image generation, photo editing, scene generation, creative extension, etc.
Basic video editing capabilities, able to use Premiere, CapCut, After Effects, and other tools to complete daily promotional video editing, packaging, and simple animation processing
Strong sensitivity to overseas aesthetics, brand communication, and internet visual trends, experience with cross-border e-commerce, DTC brands, or overseas markets preferred

bonus.title: Bonus Points
items: Experience with standalone site brands, cross-border e-commerce, home furnishing, or lifestyle brands
Experience building brand visual systems or standalone site visual standards from 0 to 1
Strong AI creative capabilities, able to truly apply AI tools to design efficiency and content production
Video script understanding, camera sense, or short video content packaging experience
Mature portfolio demonstrating comprehensive capabilities in web design, brand visuals, communication materials, and video processing
Good English reading ability, able to understand overseas website visual styles and reference cases

value.title: Role Value
items: You will participate in building the visual system of a new cross-border home design brand from 0 to 1, leading standalone site design, brand visual communication, and content packaging. This role is not just an execution design position, but an important owner of brand visual expression and users' first impression, directly impacting company brand image, user experience, and conversion effectiveness

positions.title: Luxury Home Customization Partner / Business Lead
positions.summary: Targeting overseas high-end residential markets, responsible for full-cycle deal closure from lead to contract signing to delivery coordination.

positioning.title: Role Positioning
items: We are building a whole-house business team targeting overseas high-end residential markets, looking for someone familiar with Shangceng Design, luxury whole-house solutions, whole-house customization, and high-net-worth customer deal logic, as a business partner/lead to help the company打通 the business conversion chain for luxury residential projects.

This role is not traditional store sales or simple order running, but needs to surround luxury customers, designer channels, project managers, and procurement chains, driving project deal closure from demand communication, proposal collaboration, quote and contract signing to procurement and落地.

responsibilities.title: Responsibilities
items: Responsible for developing and closing high-end residential/luxury home whole-house customization business, focusing on core roles such as high-net-worth owners, design firms, designers, project managers, and procurement leads
Based on the company's
business model, drive whole-house business conversion, covering furniture, customization, soft furnishings, building materials, outdoor, and other whole-house products
Build and maintain connections in high-end design circles, luxury project circles, and villa/large home customer circles, forming stable customer acquisition and referral mechanisms

Responsible for key customer negotiations and deal closure advancement, including demand梳理, budget judgment, cooperation model communication, project pace advancement, contract signing, and payment collection follow-up
Coordinate with designers, supply chain, product, and delivery teams to drive smooth project衔接 from concept proposal, detailed proposal, quote list, procurement contract to落地 delivery

Able to identify key decision-makers and executors in luxury projects, not just focusing on bosses or lead designers, but also cultivating project managers, procurement, design assistants, and other execution chains to improve actual deal closure efficiency
Participate in business model打磨, helping the company establish customer management, quote collaboration, and project advancement SOPs suitable for luxury whole-house business
If highly matched, can participate as
in team building and business revenue-sharing mechanism design

requirements.title: Requirements
items: 5+ years high-end home furnishing, whole-house customization, luxury whole-house solutions, design firms, or large home customer sales or business management experience
Background in whole-house solutions, luxury design studios, high-end whole-house companies, high-end customization brands preferred
Familiar with luxury customer decision logic, understanding high-net-worth customer requirements for aesthetics, materials, quality, delivery, and service experience
Mature customer resources or designer channel resources, able to quickly bring project opportunities
Strong project-based sales capabilities, able to drive complex long-chain deal closure, not just standard product quick sales
Understand design collaboration, able to advance projects with designers, detailing, customization, and supply chain teams
Understand quotes, products, and basic processes, knowing the cooperation relationships among whole-house customization, furniture, soft furnishings, and building materials in projects

Entrepreneurial mindset, able to accept building business from 0 to 1, not just adapting to mature large platform divisions

Understand both design deal closure and supply chain and落地 delivery

items: You can win over high-end customers and also win over designers
You know luxury customers aren't buying
, but overall effect, project certainty, and delivery peace of mind
You're not just someone who
, but someone who talks proposals, talks cooperation, talks efficiency, talks results

positions.title: Image & Content Processing Intern
positions.summary: Participate in image screening, content verification, and basic 3D image processing assistance, supporting content production workflows.

responsibilities.title: Responsibilities
items: Image screening and review: Conduct preliminary screening, classification, and quality review of large volumes of images according to established standards, ensuring image content meets project requirements

3D image processing assistance: Assist the team with simple processing, format conversion, basic editing, or preprocessing of 3D images (no advanced 3D modeling skills required, but learning willingness and basic understanding needed)
Content comparison and organization: Compare, verify, and organize copy, descriptions, or metadata related to images, ensuring information accuracy and consistency
Data annotation assistance: May involve simple tagging or classification of image content
Other supporting tasks: Complete other image and content processing-related auxiliary tasks assigned by the team

requirements.title: Requirements
items: Education: Current undergraduate or graduate student, design, fine arts, computer science, media, literature, and related majors preferred but not required

Basic skills: Proficient in computer and common office software (Word, Excel); certain aesthetic ability and sensitivity to images; careful, patient, responsible, able to efficiently complete repetitive work
Personal traits: Strong learning ability, able to quickly master new tools and processes; good communication and teamwork skills; able to adapt to fast-paced work environments, pressure resistant

bonus.title: Bonus Points
items: Knowledge or experience with Photoshop, Lightroom, and other image processing software
Certain understanding or interest in 3D images, CGI (Computer Generated Imagery)
Good text comprehension and processing capabilities
Experience in data annotation or content review preferred

benefits.title: What You'll Gain
items: Practical experience: Deep understanding of actual image processing and content management workflows
Skill improvement: Exposure to and learning of 3D image processing related knowledge, improving image aesthetics and content review capabilities
Team atmosphere: Work with experienced professionals, receive guidance and feedback
Internship certificate: Excellent performers can receive internship certificates and opportunities for conversion or long-term cooperation
